description: Reference example of a connector-manifest.json for the lecture class. Copy and adapt for your platform.

instance_fields.name: instance_url
instance_fields.label: Platform URL
instance_fields.description: Base URL of the platform instance

instance_fields.name: api_key
instance_fields.label: API Key
instance_fields.description: Platform API key. Stored encrypted. Required for API-based connectors, optional for guest-link-only connectors.

instance_fields.name: inactivity_timeout_seconds
instance_fields.label: Inactivity Timeout (seconds)
instance_fields.description: Emit LectureErrorEvent after N seconds of silence. Prevents the connector from staying connected after an unexpected platform failure.

runtime_fields.name: join_url
runtime_fields.label: Join URL
runtime_fields.description: Platform join link or enrollment URL

runtime_fields.name: instructor_id
runtime_fields.label: Instructor Platform ID
runtime_fields.description: Platform user ID of the instructor — used for speaker identification

runtime_fields.name: instructor_full_name
runtime_fields.label: Instructor Full Name
runtime_fields.description: Used to match the instructor in the platform roster and populate MediaFrame.is_instructor

debug_fields.name: debug_enabled
debug_fields.label: Enable Debug Logging
debug_fields.description: Sets log level to DEBUG. Default is INFO. Enable only for troubleshooting — generates verbose output.
